# **Appendix**

## Meeting notes

- PC allows to monitor wa group
- Handle
    - delayed response in case of user are not available, on holiday, out of business hours
    - SLA breach logic to build
- RM on leave
    - Backup RM to respond on chat
    - Dedicated person who will work as backup
- Backup RM assignment based on Query type like application journey
- For query like payout, backup user should be able to create task on LSQ and assign to RM
- Periscope has SLA?
- How to create task on LSQ when not responded within 30 min
- If RM is present create task for RM and if RM are not available then create task for Backup user
- Quality metric to track for chat

Task on LSQ

- Pending chat → If task not closed then escalate to mangers
-
